briefs.user_prompt: Draft a Meta launch campaign for Allbirds Tree Runners. Audience: trail runners who care about sustainability. Product page: https://www.allbirds.com/products/mens-tree-runners-shoe
Write a TikTok ad for Liquid Death sparkling water. Lean into the irreverent brand voice. https://liquiddeath.com/products/severed-lime
Meta ad for the Ridge Wallet — minimalist EDC. Audience: men 25-45 sick of bulky leather bifolds. https://ridge.com/products/the-ridge-wallet
X (Twitter) promoted post for Linear — issue tracking for high-velocity engineering teams. Tone: peer-to-peer, no SaaS-speak. https://linear.app
Pinterest ad for Tushy bidet. Audience: design-conscious renters who think bidets are foreign. https://hellotushy.com/products/tushy-classic-3-0
Reddit ad for AG1 (Athletic Greens). Audience: r/biohackers crowd that's skeptical of supplement claims. https://drinkag1.com
Google search ads for Calm — meditation app for people who can't sit still. Headlines + descriptions only. https://www.calm.com
Meta launch ad for Bombas socks. Lean into the buy-one-give-one mission. Audience: parents, gift-givers. https://bombas.com/collections/mens-socks
TikTok ad for Hims hair loss treatment. Audience: men in their 20s noticing thinning, embarrassed to ask. Voice: matter-of-fact, no shame. https://www.forhims.com/hair-loss
Pinterest ad for Patagonia Better Sweater fleece. Audience: PNW outdoor parents, Saturday morning trailhead crowd. https://www.patagonia.com/product/mens-better-sweater-fleece-jacket/25528.html
Write something for Notion that converts. https://notion.so
